entry.title: Database degraded performance (resolved)
entry.content:
resolved — Database has recovered and is fully operational again. Automated monitoring confirms healthy responses.

investigating — Automated monitoring detected that Database is responding slowly or partially. Our team has been alerted.

entry.title: Notifications & Email degraded performance (resolved)
entry.content:
resolved — Notifications & Email has recovered and is fully operational again. Automated monitoring confirms healthy responses.

investigating — Automated monitoring detected that Notifications & Email is responding slowly or partially. Our team has been alerted.
